# Golden Deer — Premium Roasted Makhana

## About
Golden Deer is a premium roasted makhana (fox nuts) brand owned by Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd., an Indian FMCG enterprise. We produce clean-label, slow-roasted makhana snacks for retail consumers and supply hand-sorted jumbo-grade raw makhana for bulk and wholesale buyers.

## Brand & Legal
- Brand: Golden Deer
- Parent Company: Cosmic Power Pvt. Ltd.
- CIN: U46307BR2026PTC085787
- GSTIN: 10AANCC9477F2ZG
- Startup India: DIPP269634
- MSME: UDYAM-BR-26-0237862

## Product Range (6 SKUs)
1. Classic Roast — lightly salted, popped in minimal healthy fats
2. Himalayan Pink Salt & Pepper — mineral salt + cracked pepper
3. Tangy Tomato — sun-ripened tomato dusting
4. Creamy Cheese — real aged cheddar coating
5. Spicy Masala — traditional Indian spice blend
6. Premium Raw Makhana — hand-sorted jumbo grade (5-6 suta), retail AND bulk

## Key Differentiators
- Clean-label: 3 ingredients for Classic Roast — makhana, cold-pressed oil, sea salt
- High protein (9.7g/100g), very low fat (0.1g/100g), naturally gluten-free
- Hand-sorted jumbo-grade seeds with grade traceability
- Touchless slow-roasting — never fried, no artificial preservatives
- Airtight nitrogen-flushed packaging for extended shelf life
- Direct farmer partnerships with fair-trade practices

## Sales Channels
- Retail D2C: quick-commerce platforms (Blinkit, Zepto) and Amazon
- Bulk & Wholesale: direct inquiry via website form or WhatsApp

- Home: https://goldendeer.in
